title: Navy Jack Signature Bag
excerpt: We have a brand new bag collaboration with amykathryn! It's one style, in this color combo (though we changed the trim to navy on the side pockets) and only available in limited quantities. Although this Navy Jack bag is exclusive…
body:
We have a brand new bag collaboration with amykathryn! It's one style, in this color combo (though we changed the trim to navy on the side pockets) and only available in limited quantities. Although this Navy Jack bag is exclusive to the website and limited-edition, I think (and hope) we produced enough quantity so that they won’t sell out immediately. Our first bag was available and in the shop for almost 2 months, but I have a feeling these may go slightly quicker. I love that this eco-friendly (non-leather) bag carries everything I need in it – it’s the perfect size for toting around town or travel. It has a lot of pockets and room for a DSLR and can hold an 11 inch MacBook Air as well as iPads. There’s more info in the shop. I put it in the Scrapbooking kits category (mainly because we didn’t have a different place set up for it yet).

Navy Jack Bag | Amytangerine by amykathryn -Carry-all shoulder bag -Zipper top closure -Eco-friendly (non-leather) -Designed in Los Angeles, Manufactured in China -1 exterior zipper pocket -2 exterior magnetic snap closure pockets -2 exterior open pockets on sides -2 interior open pockets -Large interior zipper pocket -Interior divider with zipper pocket -12”w x 12” h x 5”d

We got the above sample a couple months ago and decided to have navy trim for the side pockets instead. Here is the actual bag that's in the shop.

**To celebrate this fall launch, we’re offering free shipping worldwide (while supplies last) if you place your order by October 10th. We really want to show our appreciation for all your continued support! Thanks for being excited and I hope to see some photos of you carrying this bag around soon!
